title: NeoTavern Demo
noChats: No chats yet. Select a character to start.

deleteChat.title: Delete Chat
deleteChat.description: Delete "{{title}}"? This will also remove all messages in this conversation. This action cannot be undone.

savepoint.title: Create Savepoint
savepoint.description: Save a snapshot of current messages for "{{title}}". The name can be left blank and will be auto-generated.
